ruleScores.ruleName: Every Rule Has Severity and Enforcement
Every Rule Has a Bad → Good Example
Agent Document Has Version and Last-Updated

strengths: All 7 required sections present: Meta, Purpose, Applicability, Rules, Exceptions, Checklist, Tool Integration
All 9 rules properly formatted with severity [BLOCKER/CRITICAL/WARNING] and enforcement [BLOCKED/PREVENTED/REVIEWED/ADVISORY] labels
Rule count of 9 is within the required 5-9 bounds
Every rule includes concrete Bad → Good code examples with clear violations and corrections
Comprehensive boundary definitions in related section with explicit handoffs to Architecture and Security agents
Specific enforcement tools named throughout: Migration Tool, Database Linter, Bundle Analyzer, Database Policy Check, etc.
YAML metadata includes version: 1.0 and last_updated: 2026-04-09
Checklist has exactly 9 items matching the 9 rules (R1-R9) in correct order
Tool Integration table provides complete mapping of rules to enforcement mechanisms with coverage levels
